creator: borjam@sarenet.es
text:
Luigi Rizzo and Stefano Garzarella pointed out several bugs. Notably, no locking operations in critical sections.

Stefano Garzarella sent a test patch against -STABLE. With the patch I haven't been able to reproduce the panics. 

Stefano noted that the latest version I was trying, 747, has some missing locking statements. 

Relevant thread on freebsd-net:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-net/2014-July/039148.html
